claim_support.reason: Most claims are well-supported by cited chunks and calcs. However, specific stock performance metrics (21.7% weekly gain, 44.3% YTD, 13.1% monthly gain) and the 75% discount figure lack visible support in the provided truncated news snippets or dedicated data chunks.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe material errors in growth rate calculations. Revenue YoY growth is stated as 16.53% (vs Q3 2024 $4,060M), but the math reflects QoQ growth vs Q2 2025 ($3,786M). Similarly, Net Income YoY growth is stated as 190.61% (vs Q3 2024 $684M), but the math reflects QoQ growth vs Q2 2025 ($330M). These mislabels materially misrepresent financial performance trends.

citation_precision.reason: Cited chunk IDs and calc IDs align with the content they support. No mismatches found between claims and the authoritative evidence identifiers provided.

temporal_validity.reason: All evidence dates (news and financial periods) are on or before the report as-of date of 2025-11-24. No post-as-of claims detected.

consistency.reason: Internal consistency is maintained across paragraphs (e.g., financial figures match between Recent Developments and Financial Analysis), even though the underlying growth calculations are erroneous.

financial_numeric.reason: Skipped because the report failed the Accuracy Gate due to severe numerical errors.
